# Medicare Robots.txt
# https://medicares.in

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /home
Allow: /aboutus
Allow: /team
Allow: /login
Allow: /signup
Allow: /forgot-password
Allow: /dashboard
Allow: /reports
Allow: /prescriptions
Allow: /prescription-reminders
Allow: /find-hospital
Allow: /hospital/*
Allow: /doctor/login
Allow: /doctor/signup
Allow: /doctor/pending-verification
Allow: /contact

# Disallow admin, private, founder and staff pages
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /founder/
Disallow: /founder/*
Disallow: /staff/
Disallow: /staff/*
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /private/*
Disallow: /verify-email/*
Disallow: /reset-password/*

# Backend paths
Disallow: /Backend/admin/
Disallow: /Backend/admin/*
Disallow: /Backend/founder/
Disallow: /Backend/founder/*
Disallow: /Backend/staff/
Disallow: /Backend/staff/*
Disallow: /Backend/private/
Disallow: /Backend/private/*

# Files
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.js$
Disallow: /*.css$
Disallow: /*.scss$
Disallow: /*.md$
Disallow: /*.env$
Disallow: /*.config.js$

# Allow sitemap
Allow: /sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay for bots
Crawl-delay: 10

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://medicares.in/sitemap.xml
